StringTable.string: Check timeout, may be too long line! Proposed close-range upgrade
The current permission is in use
user name and group name can not contain .[ ] % can not begin with &, also can not be empty.
Successfully modified the current user. Please log in again
The two passwords do not match, please re-enter!

Please,reset your password! Your Password must contain 6~18 characters, Include at leas two character types, The supporting character types are letters(uppercase and lowercase), numbers and special characters.
The username exists, please re-enter different username!
A new alarm message has occurred on the device
The answer can not be empty
The browser binding has expired, please log in again
The password must contain at least two types of digits, letters, and characters!
Set has been Successful,and will Work after Restart,Restart immediately?
the domain name already in use, please try another
The domain must have a maximum of 50 characters and minimum of 5 characters. Use letters or numbers.
E-mail is invalid. Please input an valid e-mail address.
(Restore Common Parameters Except IP Address & Username-Password)
The factory restore operation is completed and needs to be restarted to take effect; if the device does not restart at this time, please restart the device manually.
Please select setting entries that you want to default
Failure To Online Upgrade,Maybe The Device Disable The Function Of Online Upgrade,Please Check It Out
Channel name error, name cannot contain ", \ characters
SMTP server cannot be empty,please enter details...
Username cannot be empty,please enter details...
[UTC-07:00]mountain Time(U.S. and Canada)|[UTC-06:00]central Time(U.S. and Canada)|[UTC-05:00]Eastern Time(U.S. and Canada)|[UTC-04:00]Atlantic Time(Canada)|[UTC-03:30]Newfoundland
The disk is read only, cannot be formatted!
The disk is read only, cannot be partitioned!
The capacity of the snapshot partition should not be less than 1G
The recording partition capacity shall not be less than 1G
Format disk,please not do other operations
Partitioning disk,please do not do other operations
The disk partition is complete and the device is about to restart
This Operation Will Clear All Video Record In the Storage Equipment, Click "OK"to Continue, Click "Cancel" to Suspend
This Operation will Set the Storage Equipment Read Only, All the Video Record will not be Covered, Are You Sure to Execute?
This Operation will Set the Storage Equipment As Work Disk ,can be read or written
This Operation will Set the Storage Equipment As Redundant Disk, and Store Redundancy Only, Are You Sure to Execute?
This Operation will Set the Storage Equipment As Snapshot Disk, and Store Snapshot Only, Are You Sure to Execute?
The file exceeds the maximum transfer bytes!
Please provide answer in order to reset password
After restoring the device to default, log in for the first time and force password setting
The IP address is in the blacklist
64 blacklists can be added at most!
IP address scope is not legal!
This ipaddrss already existed in blacklist
This ipaddrss already existed in trustlist
64 whitelists can be added at most!
seconds later,the browser will automatically close the current page
seconds later, the browser will automatically close the current page. Please log in again after the device starts
second later ,the browser will be closed automatically,please use the search tool to re-login
The current channel intercom is in progress. Close the channel and start the device intercom
The device is interworking. Shut down the device and start channel interworking
Are you sure you want to remove all logs?
After disabling reuse, the browser will not be able to access the device. Are you sure you want to disable reuse
For stable operation after installation, the function will be turned off automatically after 24 hours of connection.
Network device has changed, please re-log the device!
Manually reboot the device and port configuration to take effect!
Wired network card 1 and wired network card 2 cannot be configured as IP addresses in the same network segment
The latest version is detected, if you need to update, please download it in "Local Setting-Version"
Password security factor is low! Please modify!
Suggested password length is at least 6 characters, including at least 2 types of numbers, uppercase and lowercase letters, and other characters
The current video is not open
The specified download path does not exist. Please check the client configuration!
Please try again after connecting to the LAN
Currently, some devices are being upgraded. Please log in later
Only One Channel Can Be Selected!
It is not a correct mobile number
Scan APP QR Code and download & Install the application.

Please open the monitoring APP on your mobile phone (you can scan the QR code on the right side of the page to install it), log in with your account or log in locally, then click the scan button above, scan the QR code on the left side of the page, and finally enter the verification code to reset. password.
Security issues can not be same
Do you want to restart the device?
Exceed the maximum number of connections limit, you can not continue to add
RTSP address at the beginning of the error
This action will change the IP of front-end devices, Are you sure?
time port can't be less than
Send verification code to mobile app
Send verification code to my contact profile
Recommends you write down your questions and answers and store it in a secure location
Please set security questiones to reset your password later
Please select the channel you want to copy
ip, subnet mask, gateway does not match
The capture interval can not be less than 5 seconds
The message was blocked, please change the message subject!
The program version is up to date
Make sure UPNP is running on router,befor using this.
The upgrade failed, the device is restarting!
The upgrade is successful and the device is restarting
Failed to send the upgrade file!
Warning : Do not Close the Browser or Turn Off Power when Upgrading
Username or password has been changed, please login again!
The user reuse is not enabled and cannot log in
The feature is not supported by the device.
If Need Any Technical Support, Please Call On 8591185511. We Always Availiable For You. Thank you
The number of verifications exceeds the limit. Please restart the device and try again
Set the corresponding relations between Alarm Input and Car Status
Upgrading is not supported on the front end
Upgrade file models do not match
Host IP Update, reboot the device
Please select a licensed IP to delete

string.id: Query The Server List Time Out

StringTable.string: Query the server list time out

string.id: The Client Uuid Is Not Null

StringTable.string: The client uuid is not null

string.id: The Time Of ID Passed Its Time

StringTable.string: The time of ID passed its time

string.id: The Server Has No This ID

StringTable.string: The server has no this ID

string.id: Wait For The Connection Request Time Out

StringTable.string: Wait for the connection request time out!

string.id: Wait For The Connection Response Of Device Time Out

StringTable.string: Wait for the connection response of device time out!

string.id: The Number Of Connection In The Proxy Is Full

StringTable.string: The number of connection in the proxy is full!

string.id: Register For The Proxy Time Out

StringTable.string: Register for the proxy time out!

string.id: Handshake By The Proxy Time Out

StringTable.string: Handshake by the proxy time out!

string.id: Query The Server Of Uuid Time Out

StringTable.string: Query the server of uuid time out!
Start time and end time cannot be the same!
Start time cannot be greater than end time!
After confirming the device will restart!
Setting out of range, setting failed!
Save successfully, the device will reboot!
The cruise line does not exist
Turn off the automatic mode, automatically modify the front-end IP function will be closed, continue?
Turn on automatic mode, automatically modify the front-end IP function will open, continue?
Default can not be more than the maximum!
This operation will restore the camera parameters to the default. Do you want to continue?
Invalid IPv6 address, max 4 hex per group
This action will change the IP of front-end devices, Are you sure?
Save Failed, The alarm output delay time should be between 10 and 300 seconds
Device port information has changed, please exit and reboot the device to take effect
The newly set http port number is a non secure port number. After setting, the browser cannot log in to the device normally. Do you still want to set it this way?
The current channel intercom is in progress. Close the channel and start broadcast
The device is interworking. Shut down the device and start broadcast
The device is broadcasting. Close the broadcast and start the device intercom
The device is broadcasting. Close the broadcast and start channel interworking
Are you sure you want to remove all flow count records?
Are you sure you want to remove all flow count of video OSD?
Failed to initialize server or developer account
Device interface access token authentication failed
Illegal request, device not logged in or login invalid
The device does not support services
The current login method does not support main stream preview
Password format is incorrect! Please, reset your password! Your password must contain 6-8 characters, including letters (uppercase and lowercase) and numbers.
Exceeded the maximum number of time periods, unable to continue adding!
The current password is empty,please change the password as soon as possible
3 consecutive errors, login locked, try again in 1 minute
Login locked, try again in 1 minute
Cannot set default password admin repeatedly
The contact name can not be empty
The phone number entered is not legal
This function is only applicable to engineering personnel debugging use, ordinary users do not user!
Full channel preview failed to open, CPU usage exceeds 90%, please manually switch on/off channel preview
Full channel preview failed to open, memory usage exceeds 90%, please manually switch on/off channel preview
